config.name: Teddy Truong
config.title: Rust Developer
config.description: Climber, gamer, developer. Still trying to figure out how lifetimes work in Rust.

experiences.description: Development of the serious game Cogni-Actif, aimed at simplifying the integration of physical activity in schools. Missions are kept secret for now!
Development of tools to accelerate the productivity of AutoCAD/BricsCAD engineers. Implementation of analysis tools to optimize spending. Creation of graphic libraries in AutoLisp.
Development of applications and tools to improve the productivity of partner companies.

projects.title: Robozzle
projects.description: Reproduction of the Robozzle game created by Igor Ostrovsky, built as a technical test.

projects.title: Particle Life Simulator
projects.description: 3D life particle simulator with the goal of determining the best population that could survive in a given environment.

projects.title: Harmonies with WFC
projects.description: Project inspired by the Harmonies board game. Procedural terrain generation using a Wave Function Collapse algorithm.

projects.title: Machine Learning
projects.description: This project was developed as part of the "Machine Learning" course and allows testing different learning algorithms on simple case studies as well as image classification tasks.
